description: ledger.publishRawTransaction node response conformance. The node accepts a valid account block with a null response and surfaces a non-null response when the block is rejected. Neither field-level rejection shape is documented in the Dart/TS SDKs; the Rust model treats a recognizable rejection string as Rejected { message } and any other non-null value as Unexpected(value).

rejected.description: A non-null string rejection. The message is surfaced via PublishError::Rejected.

unexpected.description: A non-null object whose shape is not a recognized rejection; surfaced via PublishError::Unexpected.
